programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: PGA winner Kevin Chappell plays the final stretch of iconic Bay Hill with renowned instructor Sean Foley; how Chappell finds the fairway when he needs to and makes putts under pressure.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: The 2017 RBC Heritage winner Wesley Bryan shares his best instruction tips and drills. Bryan breaks down how he became one of the Tour's best from inside 100 yards and how he executes from varying lies around the golf course.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Three-time winner on the PGA TOUR Brendan Steele welcomes Sean Foley to Shady Canyon, where Steele highlights all facets of his game. From exceptional distance and accuracy off the tee, to great iron play to a unique approach around the greens.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: LPGA standout Lexi Thompson discusses her career aspirations and the decision to turn pro at 15.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Sean Foley plays alongside Shubhankar Sharma to discover strategies and techniques that work for him on the big stage, and to show viewers what they can incorporate on their home courses.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: A Pee.S.A that takes on cheaters in charity golf scrambles; how surfers and skateboarders are changing golf.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the setup and swing keys needed to stick approach shots. Martin shares a drill to help make solid contact, reveals the three important post-impact checkpoints, and shows how to develop proper lower body action.

programme.title: School of Golf

programme.title: School of Golf

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Major champion Jimmy Walker breaks down all things full swing to show what has led him to multiple victories on the PGA TOUR. He highlights the trials, tribulations, and ultimately the rewards of implementing major swing changes.
